content: Self-Refine’s unstructured iterative self-feedback framework can be grounded and improved by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-improvement pipeline that retains Self-Refine’s advantage of no extra training while reducing the risk of converging to biased local optima. This hybrid framework would let LLMs avoid the common failure mode of confirming their own initial incorrect outputs by forcing self-questioning across divergent solving stances.
